translated: Yeah.
Oh,
yes.
I'll let them know.
Thank you very much.
Goodbye for now.
I feel so relieved right now.
Phew.
That's it.
I'm just relieved.
I thought I had to make up my mind and choose one or the other, but now that I don't have to,
I'm just relieved.
She's relieved.
She's so...
She's such a good girl.
I can't stay like this.
I got lucky this time, but a time will surely come when I have to make a choice.
Yeah.
A time when I have to make a decision with no right answer, so...
I have to become someone who can decide.
Yeah, she's so admirable.
So that I can lead everyone.
You're already leading them!
As the...
As the leader.
Wow.
Right.
And that was Chapter 8.
Personally, the scene that really caught my attention,
or rather, the part that left the biggest impression, was seeing Honami feeling down
because she felt like she couldn't make a choice even though she'd resolved to do so.
That scene where she resolves to become a leader who can guide everyone was really striking.
I'm the optimistic type who would just think, "Oh, yay!" in that situation.

Maybe it's because I've never been a leader, but seeing her feel that weight of responsibility makes her seem reliable, yet I also don't want her to take it too hard. I was worried she might break if she keeps going like that, so...
I decided to pick this scene for today.
Yeah.
They were lucky the offer was withdrawn but they were told they'd be included in the next slot.
I could think, "Lucky!" but if it had been withdrawn with no next time, I'd definitely think I should've spoken up sooner.
Man, that kind of stuff is so difficult.
There are so many times in life when you have to make those kinds of decisions.
I don't know how Honami will make choices in the future,
or what path Leoni will take, but I want to keep watching over them.
I just hope they don't have a falling out or that their mental health doesn't suffer.
I have no idea what kind of story is waiting for us next.
Yeah, yeah.
That's true.
ProSeka event stories always leave some kind of foreshadowing, don't they?
I mean, it's obvious since the story continues.
It's only natural, but still.
"I wish she had some of Yukky's carefree attitude."
Well, I think it's a bit early for that.
They're still high schoolers, after all.
They should worry a lot,
make mistakes, and learn from them.
I hope that's a good enough answer.
Okay.
So, personally, there was actually one more scene I liked.
Chapter 7 was shown a bit during Chapter 8 too,
but I really loved the part in Chapter 7 where Honami and Ichika go to see Miku's live show. Ichika was way more hyped than usual!
She was all like, "Yay!"
"Oh, it's Miku!"
I thought Ichika was so cute.
I thought about picking that scene too,
but then I'd just be saying "Cute! I love her! The audience is cute too!" the whole time, so I stuck to Chapter 8.
Chapter 7 was really cute too, wasn't it?
It makes me want to go back and watch it again.
Oh, please do.
Please go back and read it.
That part was just so adorable.
I want to go to a Miku live show too.
I totally get that.
Yeah.
Back when it was still called Mikupa... I'm from Wakayama,
and there was a live show there. I had the exact same energy as Ichika.
I was like, "Miku!"
I was so hyped, like, "It's really Miku!"
Yeah.
I want everyone to experience that feeling.
Anyway, I got a bit sidetracked there, but today...
